warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
10 Scap Pull Ups
15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar
10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL

strength.name: Deadlift
strength.description:
4x4 | * Shoulders to back pocket
* Crown to Ceiling
* Push the world away | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 3 sets
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
Hold 3 Sets
06:00 4 @ 70%
09:00 4 @ 70%
12:00 4 @ 70%
15:00 4 @ 70%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
30 min AMRAP
Keep consistent pace throughout
300m Run
2 Rope Clinbs
15 GHD or 20  V-ups
20 Wall Balls
15/12 Row/Ski Cals
If GHD is taken go to V-ups
82 reps per round.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlift and metcon tax posterior chain and core heavily; accessory work targets antagonists and non-competed muscle groups.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 4 at 70 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 30 minutes: Keep consistent pace throughout, 300m Run, 2 Rope Clinbs, 15 GHD or 20  V-ups, 20 Wall Balls. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders (lateral), biceps.
